description: Discussion on RPC 2.0 at Breakpoint 2023 featuring insights from various panelists including Max from Mango Markets, Noah from Helios, and Nick discussing Geyser and webhooks.
topic_summary: Panelists explore the implications of RPC 2.0, addressing challenges in decentralized application infrastructure and the evolution of tools like Geyser for data handling [t=10:40].
